context.goal: Select the inline image embedded in the PDF page so image-specific actions become available.
context.cues: TIAEditor window showing a PDF page with an embedded screenshot image in the center; the Images tool/tab is active and the bottom status says to click an inline image.

state_anchor.locator: bottom status text: 'Select image mode: Click to select inline image'

anchors.locator: embedded screenshot image in the middle of the PDF page

procedure.expect: The embedded image is selected, shown with a thin selection border; bottom status changes to image-selected instructions.
